channel.title: AI·Brief — Daily Tech Intelligence
channel.description: Automated AI-powered tech news briefings updated every 3 hours.

item.title: Stuntman Hollywood Returns to PS5
item.description: Stuntman Hollywood, featuring iconic cars, is set to launch on PS5 soon. The arcade racer promises thrilling gameplay and nostalgia for fans.

item.title: Wolverine Game Developers Unveil New Features
item.description: Developers discuss new Wolverine game footage, including X-Men cameos and a low-gore option. Players can expect intense claw combat and unique death mechanics.

item.title: God of War Laufey Announced for PS5
item.description: Sony showcased the next God of War game, Laufey, during the State of Play event. Fans can expect epic storytelling and stunning visuals.

item.title: Control Resonant Release Date Revealed
item.description: Control Resonant's release date was unveiled in a new trailer during Sony's State of Play. The trailer offers insights into the game's narrative.

item.title: BMW M2 Introduces xDrive AWD for 2027
item.description: The 2027 BMW M2 will feature an xDrive AWD model, enhancing performance and winter driving. It will come with an eight-speed automatic transmission.

item.title: Microsoft Tests Wearable AI Gadget for Workers
item.description: Microsoft is testing a wearable access badge and a desktop device aimed at enhancing productivity for office workers. The devices feature touch and voice activation.

item.title: Rayman Legends Retold Launches October 1
item.description: Rayman Legends Retold, a reimagined version of the classic, will launch on October 1. It features stunning 3D visuals and new gameplay elements.

item.title: Ace Combat 8: Wings of Theve Launches October 2
item.description: Ace Combat 8: Wings of Theve will be available on October 2 for multiple platforms. Pre-orders are now open for eager fans.

item.title: Valve Threatens to Pull Rainbow Six Siege from Steam
item.description: Valve reportedly threatened to delist Rainbow Six Siege from Steam due to a pricing dispute with Ubisoft. This highlights ongoing tensions in the gaming marketplace.

item.title: Microsoft Launches AI Behavior Testing Tool
item.description: Microsoft introduced a new open-source framework for AI behavior testing, allowing developers to create evaluations using text descriptions. This aims to streamline AI development.

item.title: Android Phones to Detect Spoofed Calls
item.description: Android's upcoming features include the ability to detect spoofed calls and impersonation scams. This aims to enhance user security and reduce fraud.

item.title: Googlebook Launch Could Feature 8 Devices
item.description: Googlebook's launch may include up to eight devices from major partners like Dell and HP. This promises a diverse range of options for consumers.

item.title: Noctua Launches First AIO CPU Coolers
item.description: Noctua's first AIO CPU coolers will launch on June 16, featuring various radiator sizes and advanced cooling technology. Prices start at €219.90.

item.title: Marathon Season 2 Launches Today
item.description: Marathon Season 2 kicks off today, introducing new changes and challenges for players. The update promises an exciting gameplay experience.

item.title: Nintendo's Switch 2 StarFox Preview
item.description: The new Switch 2 remake of StarFox impresses with its nostalgic gameplay and updated graphics. Players are excited about this fantastic do-over.
